title: Dataset for disproportionality analysis on dipeptidyl peptidase-4 inhibitors associated hyperkalemia
author: Miraj, Sonal Sekhar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The processed dataset and analysis scripts generated during the study on "Dipeptidyl Peptidase-4 Inhibitors and  Hyperkalemia: A Disproportionality Analysis" . The data supporting the findings of this study are derived from the publicly available   FDA Adverse Event Reporting System (FAERS) database  .
steps_raw: The processed dataset and analysis scripts generated during the study on "Dipeptidyl Peptidase-4 Inhibitors and  Hyperkalemia: A Disproportionality Analysis" . The data supporting the findings of this study are derived from the publicly available   FDA Adverse Event Reporting System (FAERS) database  .
keywords: FAERS, pharmacovigilance, disproportionality analysis, DDP-4 inhibitors, hyperkalemia
